meanings.definition: to move or cause to move in a sinuous, spiral, or circular course
examples: the river winds through the hills
the path meanders through the vineyards
sometimes, the gout wanders through the entire body

meanings.definition: remove facial hair by tying a fine string around it and pulling at the string
thread on or as if on a string
examples: the child drew glass beads on a string

meanings.definition: (of bolts or screws) having screw threads
